title: rna_modality_comparison_smn2_cross_v1 — CROSS-AXIS SMN2 exon-7 modality comparison
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/rna_modality_comparison_smn2_cross.py. A CROSS-AXIS in-silico side-by-side of two FDA-approved SMA drug modalities that both target SMN2 exon-7 splicing: (a) the SMALL-MOLECULE path (risdiplam-like, RNA-structure-ensemble shift via the RNA-TARGETING-SMALL-MOLECULE sub-axis) and (b) the ANTISENSE-OLIGONUCLEOTIDE path (nusinersen-like, ISS-N1 hybridization via the OLIGONUCLEOTIDE axis). CRITICAL HONESTY: this is a MODALITY COMPARISON of two in-silico model signatures — it is NOT an efficacy ranking, NOT a claim that one drug or modality is superior, NOT a clinical claim. risdiplam (Evrysdi, FDA 2020) and nusinersen (Spinraza, FDA 2016) are BOTH FDA-approved drugs. The two model signals are in different units on different real limits and are not commensurable. Each modality is anchored to its own real limit (RNA secondary-structure thermodynamics / SantaLucia NN hybridization), described by its own drug precedent, and nothing is derived from the n=6 lattice (AGENTS.tape g1/g3/g8, f1/f2/f3, f_lattice_fit). In-silico simulator-consistency only.

shared_gene_target.description: The single gene target both modalities hit.

shared_splicing_event.description: The splicing event both modalities act on (SMN2 exon-7 inclusion vs skipping).

shared_biological_goal.description: The shared biological goal (promote SMN2 exon-7 inclusion). The comparison's common ground is the shared target and goal — NOT a shared metric.

modality_rows.description: Exactly two modality signature rows: SMALL-MOLECULE and ANTISENSE-OLIGONUCLEOTIDE.

comparison_is_ranking.description: MUST be false. This deliverable is a descriptive side-by-side, never a ranking of the modalities or drugs.

comparison_kind.description: Human-readable description of the comparison kind (descriptive side-by-side).

signals_commensurable.description: MUST be false. The two model signals are in different units on different real limits and cannot be ranked against each other.

signals_commensurable_note.description: Explanation of why the two signals are non-commensurable.

honesty.description: Mandatory honesty block — comparison is NOT a ranking and NOT a clinical/efficacy/superiority claim (g8/f2).

statement.description: Prose honesty statement asserting comparison != ranking and in-silico-only scope.

modality_row.description: One modality's in-silico model signature. The model_signal is anchored to that modality's OWN real limit and described via its OWN drug precedent — never lattice-derived.

modality.description: Which of the two SMN2 exon-7 modalities this row describes.

axis_module.description: The imported axis module that produced the model signal (no fork — governance f3).

drug_precedent.description: Own FDA-approved drug precedent for the modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

mechanism.description: How the modality acts on SMN2 exon-7 splicing.

smn2_target.description: The SMN2 region this modality's model targets (toy construct).

model_signal_name.description: Name of the in-silico model-computed signal for this modality.

model_signal_value.description: The model-computed signal value. NOT comparable across modalities — different units, different real limits.

model_signal_detail.description: Modality-specific breakdown of the model signal (ensemble fractions for SMALL-MOLECULE; NN thermodynamics for ANTISENSE-OLIGONUCLEOTIDE).

real_limit_anchor.description: The real physical/thermodynamic limit this modality's signal is anchored to (g1 — real-limits-first).

real_limit_citations.description: Literature citations for the modality's real-limit anchor.

in_silico_only.description: MUST be true — in-silico simulator-consistency scope only (g8/f2).
